title: Skillbridge
description: Skillbridge is a modern, responsive e-learning platform built with the latest web technologies. It provides a seamless user experience for exploring courses, pricing plans, and academic tracks.

title: Nutritionist
description: Nutritionist is a modern, full-featured web platform dedicated to personalized nutrition coaching. Built with the latest React 19 and Tailwind CSS 4, it provides a seamless user experience with a focus on performance, clean architecture, and responsive design.
